calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together: PES-86-244682 The Trust of Frank Weber and PES-86-244629 The Trust of Josephine Crangle.
Appearances: Agnieszka Adams for (petitioner) City National Bank.

The Court stated that this is a petition to modify and to create a unitrust and provide for distribution and that there are concerns regarding the request for it to be retroactive. Ms. Adams stated that they requested it be retroactive as it took quite some time to trace beneficiaries and that they propose it be retroactive to July 1, 2016 instead of January 2016. The Court stated that payments are being made on a monthly basis and it does not see the big advantage. Ms. Adams stated that it helps with the period it took to bring this petition and confirmed that there has been no opposition. The Court granted the two petitions for modification of trust and signed the orders in open court after striking paragraph 2 regarding the retroactivity.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
